data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an override/waiver audit trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'Override/waiver audit trail' as part of the CRM SLA and Escalation Policy. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of this audit trail. The linked use case mentions the need for this audit trail but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or operational status, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: Override/waiver audit trail is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of the override/waiver audit trail.
